title: SimpleTimers
description: You can make timers with colours and that all only with the chat
body:
[![Join DC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/944e491bb266730cc410f8ace60a605419641549_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/mP23dpVQ6V)

> 💜 **Credits**
> This mod was developed with the support and guidance of **[FelixFGF](https://modrinth.com/user/FelixFGF)**. Thank you for helping throughout the development process! ✨


# **SimpleTimers ⏱️🔥**

**SimpleTimers** adds a clean and easy-to-use **on-screen timer** to your game, displayed right above your hotbar ⌛. Perfect for speedruns 🏃, challenges 🎯, or just keeping track of time while playing!

# 🆕 **Lightweight & Useful:**  
Designed to be simple yet powerful, this mod integrates seamlessly into your gameplay without distractions ⚡.

---

### ⚙️ **Full Timer Control:**  
Manage your timer with intuitive commands:
- ▶️ `/timer start` — Start the timer  
- ⏸️ `/timer pause` — Pause the timer  
- ▶️ `/timer continue` — Continue after pausing  
- ⏹️ `/timer stop` — Stop the timer completely  

## ⌨️ **Quick Access with Keybinds:**  
You can also manage and customize everything easily using the **"K" key**! Open the settings menu to adjust all options, including **timer position on the screen** 📍.

🔧 The key can be fully customized in the **Minecraft keybind settings**, so you can change it to whatever fits your setup best.

---

### 🎨 **Customizable Look:**  
Make the timer fit your style:
- 🎨 `/timer colour <color>` — Change the timer color  

## ⏳ **Flexible Time Settings:**  
Want a countdown instead of counting up? No problem!
- 🔽 `/timer time <minutes>` — Set a specific time and let it count **downwards**

## 💡 **Perfect for Challenges:**  
Whether you're doing hardcore runs 💀, building challenges 🏗️, or PvP practice ⚔️, the visible timer keeps you focused and on track.

### 🚀 **Simple & Effective:**  
No clutter, no confusion — just a reliable timer exactly where you need it.

Stay on time and in control with **SimpleTimers**! 🔥

# ❓ Can I use this mod in a modpack? 📦

***Of course! Please feel free to include this mod in your modpacks!*** 💜✨

You may:

* ✅ Use this mod in public and private modpacks
* ✅ Upload modpacks containing this mod to Modrinth, CurseForge, etc.
* ✅ Use it on servers and with friends

Just please:

* ❌ Do not reupload the mod itself
* ❌ Do not claim the mod as your own

Have fun! 🌟
